title: EasyBrushes
description: Paint walls and floors easily by creating brushes!
body:
![Easy: Brushes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c47de4b5da3d1b3332d21dbc7a3d92ec7eb3eb9c.png)

EasyBrushes Is a plugin that adds brushes similar to worldedit but for normal players! Blocks and features can be locked VIA permissions! More features will come soon so stay tuned!
(This plugin is on its testing phase, if you encounter any bugs PLEASE report it)
#
![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06113de09ba5a7231ce02b2443aaf599e90bbffd.png)

- **Multiple Brush Types**:
  - 🎨 Paint Brush: For general building and filling
  - ✏️ Outline Brush: Create perfect outlines and frames
  - 🏗️ Floor Brush: Works ONLY on floors
  - 🧱 Wall Brush: Works ONLY on walls
- **Various Building Modes**:
  - Single Block
  - Rectangle Fill
  - Rectangle Outline
  - Ellipse Fill
  - Ellipse Outline
  - Line 
  - Curve
- **Customizable Click Actions**:
  - Left Click
  - Right Click
  - Shift + Left Click
  - Shift + Right Click
- **Advanced Features**:
  - 🔄 Undo system for easy mistake correction
  - 💫 Block preview system
  - 🎵 Customizable sound effects
  - ✨ Particle effects
  - 🌟 Glow effect for brushes
  - 📏 Adjustable brush sizes (experimental)
  - 🎨 Custom particle colors

## 📋 Commands

- `/eb` - Main command
- `/eb give <player> <brush>` - Give a brush to a player
- `/eb set brush block <material>` - Set brush material
- `/eb set brush mode <mode>` - Set brush mode
- `/eb set brush size <size>` - Set brush size
- `/eb set brush color #RRGGBB` - Set particle color
- `/eb undo` - Undo last action
- `/eb reload` - Reload configuration
- `/eb sounds <sound> <enable|disable>` - Toggle brush sounds
- `/eb glow <on|off>` - Toggle brush glow effect
#
![Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd2b7c919cb46e34c1f2fedb706ccf1a0e2cabd2.png)

configurable through three main files:
- `config.yml`: Brush settings and properties
- `lang.yml`: All plugin messages
- `settings.yml`: Plugin behavior settings

Features extensive customization options:
- Custom brush items and models
- Permission-based block restrictions
- Sound effects and volumes
- Particle effects
- Glow effects
- Building restrictions
- Performance settings

## 🔌 Dependencies

### Required:
- Paper 1.21.4 or newer

### Optional:
- WorldGuard: For region protection support
- ProtocolLib: For enhanced visual effects
- Nexo: For custom item support

## 💡 Planned Features

- More brush shapes and modes
- Pattern Creation

![Support](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e00f6c1d8de9201345698a0ffd4726560e5ef628.png)

For support, bug reports, or feature requests:
- Join our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/ZWQtFbaxSj)
- View The [Docs And FAQ](https://junkeh.gitbook.io/eb)
---

Made with Love and tears by Junkeh, Please add this plugin to your favorites!
